pr.title: Record: PROTEUS v1.6 — Scylla + Parallel Residuals + Depth Recurrence + Legal TTT — val_bpb 1.0819 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Mixed INT5/INT6 per-layer quantization with learnable parallel-residual mixing and Scylla retokenization to unite legal TTT and depth recurrence engineering.
techniques: Mixed INT5/INT6 per-layer quantization with sensitivity-aware layer routing
Learnable lane_merge and resid_mix_mlp for attention/MLP mix in parallel residuals
Scylla retokenization pipeline tying legal TTT plus depth recurrence stack
